articles.title: EB-2 India Priority Date April 2026: What Changed?
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India's priority date remains frozen at July 15, 2014 in the April 2026 Visa Bulletin. Indian professionals with priority dates on or before this date can now pursue green card processing; those with later dates face 11+ year waits. Monitor the May bulletin and take immediate action if your case becomes current.

articles.title: Mukul Choudhary IPL 2026: Cricket's Helicopter Shot Sensation
articles.what_this_means: Mukul Choudhary, an MS Dhoni fanboy dominating IPL 2026, practices 100-150 sixes daily and has made the helicopter shot his signature weapon. His dedicated training regime is translating into explosive match performances that have caught selectors' attention for future Indian cricket squads.

articles.title: India Cricket Tour: Lister Called Up After Clarke Injury
articles.what_this_means: India's cricket squad faces a reshuffle as fast bowler Lister gets called up to replace injured Clarke for the Bangladesh tour. With Ben Sears unavailable for the ODI leg due to PSL commitments, India tests its bench strength ahead of the ICC Champions Trophy 2025. For US-based Indian cricket fans, watch how Lister performs and catch live scores on Willow TV and streaming platforms.

articles.title: ICC Expands WTC 2025: One-Test Series Now Allowed
articles.what_this_means: The ICC is expanding the World Test Championship to include single-Test bilateral series in the next cycle, giving cricket boards (including India) more scheduling flexibility. This means more India cricket matches to follow, more unpredictable WTC standings, and a packed calendar balancing Test cricket with the IPL 2025. For US-based fans, expect more India cricket live score updates and unusual match timings throughout the year.

articles.title: Gen Z AI Skepticism Rising: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
articles.what_this_means: Gen Z uses AI weekly but skepticism is rising—and this shift creates new demand for engineers who can build trustworthy, explainable AI systems. Indian tech professionals who pivot from "using AI faster" to "building AI responsibly" will see salary premiums of 15-25% and stronger visa sponsorship positioning in 2026.

articles.title: Yash Chopra Foundation Scholarship 2026: Rs. 5 Lakhs for Film Industry Kids
articles.what_this_means: Yash Raj Films' Yash Chopra Foundation has launched its second YCF Scholarship Program 2026, offering up to Rs. 5 lakhs to children of Hindi film industry workers for higher education. Applications open in 2026 for the 2026–27 academic year; interested families should check YRF's official website and social channels for deadlines and eligibility details.
